title: Performance
description: React.memo, useTransition, keys, and the React Compiler.

options: Skips re-render when props are shallow-equal to previous props
questions.explanation: It's shallow — pass stable references (via useMemo/useCallback) or restructure.

options: A state update as non-urgent, so React can interrupt for higher-priority work
questions.explanation: Great for filtering large lists while typing stays responsive.

options: Automatically memoizes based on data flow — reduces manual useMemo/useCallback
questions.explanation: Rely on the compiler + write idiomatic code.

questions.prompt: Biggest wins for perf are usually:
options: Correct keys, smaller trees, lazy loading, and not fetching too much
questions.explanation: Measure first (Profiler), optimize the hot path.
